query: id=334 (dbSNP rsid for HBB c.20A>T, p.Glu7Val — the sickle-cell variant)
description: HBB sickle-cell variant rs334 (Glu→Val at codon 7 of beta-globin). One of the canonical real-biology test variants. Carries 11 population frequency studies (1000Genomes / ExAC / GnomAD / HapMap / KOREAN / ALFA / etc.), multi-allelic SPDI representations, and aggregated dbSNP clinical_significance spanning 'pathogenic' through 'protective' (sickle-trait conferring malaria resistance).
trimming_note: Captured verbatim, no trimming. The `ss` field (subsnp IDs) is long but kept intact since it's an opaque comma-string we never parse.
